title: Cast Partial Frameworks
short_description: Metal framework solutions for removable partial denture cases.
description: Cast partial frameworks are produced for retention, support and patient comfort. Design review focuses on clasp placement, connector strength, tissue adaptation and a clean finish for removable partial denture cases.

gallery.caption: Framework design and finishing focused on retention, support and comfortable adaptation.
